name: MAHESH KALE PHOTOGRAPHY & VIDEOGRAPHY
address: shop no 3, B] ,BUCHADE HEIGHTS, Hinjawadi - Kasarsai Rd, Marunji Village, Hinjawadi, Marunji, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra 411057
full_address: shop no 3, B] ,BUCHADE HEIGHTS, Hinjawadi - Kasarsai Rd, Marunji Village, Hinjawadi, Marunji, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra 411057

reviews.text:
When I became a father, I wanted to capture the most precious moments of my daughter’s life through a photoshoot. I was searching for someone who could truly understand my emotions and vision, rather than just talk about packages and costs.
When I spoke with Mr. Mahesh, I was impressed by his humility and professionalism. He patiently listened to my requirements and assured me of delivering quality work. What stood out was his promise: “If you don’t like the work, you don’t have to pay.” That level of confidence and commitment is rare.
The results were absolutely amazing! Now, my daughter is 2 years old, and we recently did another photoshoot this year. It has become a tradition for us to capture these beautiful moments every year.
I highly recommend Mr. Mahesh to anyone looking for a photographer who is not only talented but also polite and humble. If you want someone who will truly capture your precious memories, just visit him once and make your decision you will never regret it.

Exceptional service from Mahesh For our housewarming, we wanted someone who could handle the tricky lighting of a traditional puja and still get great shots of the guests. He was punctual, professional, and delivered the edited photos much faster than expected. The composition and colors are stunning.
If you’re looking for a photographer who is reliable and technically skilled, look no further.

Highly recommend Mahesh Kale Photography !
Excellent quality photos and top-notch colour printing services. Mahesh Kale is not only talented but also a very kind and humble person. His friendly nature makes the entire experience smooth and enjoyable. If you're looking for professional work with a personal touch — do visit! You won't be disappointed.
